description: The CT Cranium DICOM dataset is already loaded. A dental researcher needs a specific model of the alveolar structures. Create a segmentation mask using a custom threshold range of 150 HU to 700 HU and generate a 3D surface from this mask. Save the project to /home/ga/Documents/alveolar_study.inv3 and export the 3D surface as a binary STL file to /home/ga/Documents/alveolar_surface.stl.
